purpose: DebugTunnel end-to-end generation canaries that verify installed mini-apps use Web Mini-App Lego components.

cases.goal: Build a compact polished Word Quest web mini-app using the Web Mini-App Lego components. It should use a letter grid, on-screen keyboard, dictionary/word validation, score, streak, persistent best score, and a clean reskinnable HUD. Keep it simple and reliable. Mandatory: compose from the selected Lego web-components with module imports and include the mchatai-web-components-used marker for recipe.word-logic.

Build a compact polished Mastermind code-breaker web mini-app using the Web Mini-App Lego components. It should have color/code guesses, feedback pegs, turn tracking, score, persistent best score, keyboard or click controls, and a clean reskinnable HUD. Mandatory: compose from the selected Lego web-components with module imports and include the mchatai-web-components-used marker for recipe.mastermind.

Build a compact polished Minesweeper 99 web mini-app using the Web Mini-App Lego components. It should have mine placement, reveal logic, flood reveal, flagging, timer, score, persistent best score, touch-friendly controls, and a clean reskinnable HUD. Mandatory: compose from the selected Lego web-components with module imports and include the mchatai-web-components-used marker for recipe.minesweeper.

Build a compact polished Pong web mini-app using the Web Mini-App Lego components. It should have two paddles, ball physics, score to 7, persistent best score, keyboard/touch controls, sound effects, and a clean reskinnable HUD. Mandatory: compose from the selected Lego web-components with module imports and include the mchatai-web-components-used marker for recipe.pong.
